title: hordeum spontaneum var. ithaburense
intro: Hordeum spontaneum var. ithaburense, also known as wild barley, is a subspecies of the wild barley plant that is native to the Middle East. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Hordeum spontaneum var. ithaburense include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood sugar, and alleviate digestive issues. It is often prepared as a tea or added to herbal infusions, which can also be used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
